text: Hello sir, this is CBI officer. We have found a parcel in your name containing illegal drugs. Pay 50000 immediately or you will be arrested.
Hi mom, I reached the office safely. Will call you back later.
Congratulations! You have won a lottery of 1 Million Dollars. Click this link to claim.
Hey John, are we still meeting for lunch at 12:30?
Your electricity bill for the last month is pending. Your power will be cut off tonight by 9 PM. Call this number to pay.
Can you please send me the presentation slides from yesterday's meeting? Thanks.
This is customer support. Your bank account is blocked due to suspicious activity. Share your OTP to unblock.
I've attached the signed contract for the new project. Let me know if you need anything else.
Earn 10,000 per day working from home just by liking YouTube videos. Join our Telegram group now.
Happy birthday! Hope you have a wonderful day ahead.
